title: agropyron subulatum
intro: Agropyron subulatum, also known as blue wildrye or blue grama, is a perennial grass native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its alkaloid and terpenoid compounds. The health benefits of Agropyron subulatum include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Agropyron subulatum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
